title: Anyone know about the security features on forms?
excerpt: If we need to collect sensitive data from clients during the onboarding process, how secure are the Monday native forms and is there any restriction on what info can be collected in our forms like on Jotform and Wuffoo?

posts.author: MStevens (Melissa Stevens)
posts.cookedHtml: If we need to collect sensitive data from clients during the onboarding process, how secure are the Monday native forms and is there any restriction on what info can be collected in our forms like on Jotform and Wuffoo?
